The following events took place in '''95 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

This [[Standard year/Legends|year]] was known as '''Year 60''' before the [[Great ReSynchronization]].

==Events==
*[[Entechment]] was proposed with the election of a new [[Shreeftut]] on [[Lwhekk/Legends|Lwhekk]].
*[[Fort Tusken/Legends|Fort Tusken]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] was abandoned and destroyed after three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Sand People]] attacks.<ref name="SoT">''[[Secrets of Tatooine]]''</ref>

==Births==
*[[Mix Liddell]] {{Circa}}<ref name="BL">{{GamerCite|7|Bartyn's Landing (article)}}</ref>
*[[Tor Vizsla]]
